message:
fix(polyfills): fix async_hooks and multi-module bundling issues

- Add module-to-file mapping for async_hooks and timers/promises -> zlib.js
  These modules are defined inside zlib.js, not in separate files
- Fix temporal dead zone issue in TTY code by checking globalThis.Readable
  instead of local Readable to avoid TDZ when stream.js is bundled
- Add duplicate module detection to prevent zlib.js from being included twice
- Revert getDependencies call that caused silent failures

Fixes: async_hooks not loading when required alone
Fixes: multi-module bundles crashing with TDZ error

files.patch:
@@ -177,8 +177,6 @@ pub fn getDependencies(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, required: []const []const u
         .{ "cluster", &[_][]const u8{ "events", "net" } },
         .{ "zlib", &[_][]const u8{ "buffer", "stream" } },
         .{ "readline", &[_][]const u8{ "events", "stream" } },
-        .{ "async_hooks", &[_][]const u8{"zlib"} }, // async_hooks is defined in zlib.js
-        .{ "perf_hooks", &[_][]const u8{"events"} },
         .{ "timers/promises", &[_][]const u8{"timers"} },
         .{ "stream/promises", &[_][]const u8{"stream"} },
     };
